_comment: Projects tracked for the token-efficiency metric (tokens per public ship). status: 'shipped' = public, others can use it; 'building' = private, headed for a public release. 'match' = case-insensitive substrings of the log-folder key used to attribute tokens. ANYTHING NOT LISTED HERE IS IGNORED — private/work projects, music exploration, and one-off tasks don't count for or against you. Edit freely; the chart picks it up on the next run.
